description_long: This is a two-story commercial building functioning as a real estate agency, with a flat roof and a rectangular footprint. The facade features large windows on the ground floor, allowing visibility into the agency's interior, and a prominent sign above the entrance displaying the business name. The building is situated in an urban context, accompanied by a bus, a bus stop shelter, a red car, two human figures, and several trees, suggesting a lively street-side location. The exterior walls are clad in light-colored materials, with a staircase visible on one side leading to the upper floor. The rear and side views show additional windows and a back door, while the roof appears accessible and flat. The overall design is functional and modern, with minimal decorative elements.
description: A modern, two-story real estate agency with large front windows, a business sign, and a flat roof, set in an urban street scene with vehicles, people, and trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the agency's main entrance, large windows, business signage, and adjacent bus stop with a bus and people.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the external staircase, rear windows, and the proximity of the bus and car.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back door, additional windows, and the flat roof, with trees and the bus visible nearby.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the car parked near the building, the bus in front, and a tree to the side.
